73806.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Crypto perps come onshore
73806.body:
| ICE meets with Hyperliquid | Ventuals reimburses SpaceX pre-IPO traders | Sui suffers another outage | and more

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by Daniel Kuhn | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Friday 🎉 *Bitcoin* broke $74,100 following a rough week, as the long-term holder supply hit a record 15.8 million BTC — in part due to short-term holders aging into the long-term category, *CryptoQuant* said.

In today's newsletter, the *CFTC* has officially greenlit the first *regulated* *perps* in the U.S., *Intercontinental Exchange* CEO Jeffrey Sprecher said the firm has met with *Hyperliquid* , *Ventuals* will compensate traders after its pre-IPO SpaceX perps plunged 45%, *Base* launched its Azul upgrade, and more.

Meanwhile, *Sui* has suffered another *outage* on Friday, following a six-hour network stall yesterday.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*📈 CFTC opens door for crypto perpetual future contracts in US as Coinbase, Kalshi move forward*

Polymarket ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403040/cftc-opens-door-for-crypto-perpetual-future-contracts-in-us-as-coinbase-kalshi-move-forward?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

The *Commodity Futures Trading Commission* issued a staff advisory and approvals on Friday, opening the door for *Kalshi* and *Coinbase* — and potentially others — to list perpetual futures contracts in the U.S., a significant move to onshore the massive perps trading sector.

* KalshiEX, a federally regulated platform, was greenlit to list a Bitcoin perpetual contract *(BTCPERP)* , while the CFTC also took a no-action stance for Coinbase Financial Markets, allowing it to offer digital commodity derivatives products, including perps, in the country.
* The CFTC's Division of Clearing and Risk, Division of Market Oversight and Market Participation Division issued the staff advisory, which is not a formal rulemaking. The notice also said the perps contract design “may not be suitable for all asset classes.”
* “Today’s action to onshore crypto asset perpetuals reflects the @CFTC’s commitment to fostering responsible innovation while ensuring that these novel products are traded on regulated exchanges that uphold customer protections and market integrity,” CFTC Chairman *Michael Selig* said on X.
* Perps are a t

Onchain Assets Weekly

Автор: Securitize

This week’s highlights: State of RWAs; VBILL unlocks Euler collateral; Blockworks launches Token Transparency Alliance; Securitize CEO on CEPT; and upcoming crypto IPOs. State of Real-World Assets (RWA) | BitMart BitMart’s latest RWA report points to BlackRock’s BUIDL as a standout example of institutional RWA adoption, with Securitize supporting the fund’s token issuance and transfer agency. READ MORE VanEck's Tokenized Fund Lands on Euler as DeFi Courts Wall Street Institutions | CoinDesk VBILL can now be posted as collateral in curated Euler markets, giving eligible investors a way to access stablecoin liquidity without selling their tokenized Treasuries. READ MORE Blockworks Launches the Transparency Alliance | Blockworks Securitize is among the founding members of Blockworks’ Transparency Alliance, a coalition using Token Transparency Filings to bring more structure to token market disclosures. READ MORE Carlos Domingo on Securitize, Tokenization and Its SPAC Deal with Cantor Equity Partners II | SPAC Insider Podcast Carlos Domingo explains how Securitize built profitable institutional partnerships in tokenization and why CEPT stood out as the right vehicle for its move toward the public markets. LISTEN NOW Crypto IPOs Could Create Massive $1 Trillion Market Amid Tokenization Wave, Jefferies Says | CoinDesk The Wall Street investment bank expects a wave of crypto and blockchain public listings over the next two years as institutional investors shift their focus from speculative trading to real-world financial infrastructure. READ MORE

73803.subject: The Daily Degen - May 29th, 2026
73803.sender: The Daily Degen from The Daily Degen <thedailydegen@substack.com>
73803.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-may-29th-2026

Happy Friday lads and ladettes! Lots of stuff going on in brypto world!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles)
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.569T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $736.10
Gold: $4,552.50
Silver: $75.27
Oil (WTI): $86.85
US 10Y Treasury: 4.445%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 34
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
“Vaults” continues to be a huge buzzword as of late, and for good reason!
Many believe that “vaults” are the primary manner in which defi will be brought to the masses, and that it is also one of the most appropriate terms with which we can communicate the value defi provides!
In this vein, there is no project out there more intentionally and devotedly building upon this concept than @rocksolidHQ [ https://substack.com/redirect/2702d31d-2018-41c6-8615-f20e773939ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
RockSolid is an extremely cool new project built by co-founders Ben Ward @wardy_ben [ https://substack.com/redirect/03532114-a1bd-40eb-a029-b00d9eb09e51?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and Steve Pack @paladin_eth [ https://substack.com/redirect/50e5bbb0-68a6-4d59-b3a8-e67b6b56f021?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]… who started RockSolid to bring the best yield-maxxing opportunities possible to the world of defi!
They now have two such vaults: a) the Rocksolid $rETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/b363ecb2-8ce1-48d4-ae4d-37a2d029f017?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and b) the RockSolid AutoPlus Looped $ETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/26608186-c9cf-4a40-b3ff-286a0d554cbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
In addition, if you want a great breakdown of everything RockSolid is doing, check out the interview they did with Sam Kamani for the Rocket Fuel podcast (embedded below!)…
Also make sure to follow RockSolid on Twitter/X [ https://substack.com/redirect/2702d31d-2018-41c6-8615-f20e773939ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates as well, and stay tuned as we continue bringing updates on everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly red today. Fastest-growing chains on the weekly with at least $1M TVL are Strato, Igra, and Pharos. 
Protocols are mixed today. Fastest-growing protocols on the weekly with at least $1M TVL are Interest Protocol (a CDP on ETH Mainnet and OP Mainnet), Hubra (and uncategorized protocol on Solana), and Rain (a prediction market on Arbitrum). 
Here’s The Top 12 Chains By TVL (from

73800.subject: Where the world’s value trades
73800.body:
View this post on the web at https://uniswap.substack.com/p/where-the-worlds-value-trades

this week: what’s next for tokenized assets ∞ swap with base mcp ∞ hook the future ∞ new defi teams to watch ∞ see you in new york city
Community news
All value onchain: Standard Chartered predicts $4T of tokenized assets [ https://substack.com/redirect/8362d251-466d-4d9a-b7cf-6f2a9756b485?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] will be onchain by the end of 2028, split between stablecoins and RWAs, with DEXs like Uniswap serving as their native liquidity layer. More on where digital assets go next, here [ https://substack.com/redirect/95a2efce-5a3f-435e-8085-c58e97f286da?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ].
Swap from your favorite AI: Base MCP [ https://substack.com/redirect/a904e80a-f00f-4e56-bb78-6dd349475f7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] launched this week with Uniswap built in. Connect Base MCP to your AI of choice, ask your agent to swap or open an LP position, and your Base Account signs it onchain. It’s as easy as chat: no integration required. Base MCP uses the public Uniswap API [ https://substack.com/redirect/20aa35ef-7e92-4374-b747-92cb20f53c95?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. If you’re building agentic apps, you can wire it up the same way.
Teams to watch: Crecimiento Acceleration Season [ https://substack.com/redirect/9203e9cf-80a2-4f83-8413-1efd4b471787?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] wrapped yesterday with 14 teams showcasing their work. Over the past six weeks, an ambitious cohort of DeFi founders have gone through the incubator, building projects that span agent-driven liquidity protocols and browser-based swap extensions. For a look into what’s next, check out the Demo Day stream [ https://substack.com/redirect/2b556d50-f7bd-4259-b650-037ca70cadab?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. 
You can just build things. Subscribe for Uniswap developer community updates.
Hook the future: Last week OKX launched a new hackathon [ https://substack.com/redirect/ec3e5fea-680d-45e3-bf82-61d8efccdc4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for v4 teams. Build hooks, launch on X Layer, and drive real onchain traction. Top projects can win up to $14K in prizes, with ongoing ecosystem support from the OKX team. 
Let’s build, NYC: The UF is offering $10K in prizes for EthGlobal hackers building with Uniswap API. Trading apps, agentic systems, automated strategies, new financial primitives: we want to see it. Apply here [ https://substack.com/redirect/fb42041d-222c-48f8-aea5-95d0b715d33a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ].
Quick hits:
Good bots: In the last week, Bankr’s [ https://substack.com/redirect/986c3d23-3d91-4a1c-ae96-4c8cd6552c55?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqp

73798.subject: The best books of 2026 so far
73798.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTF9AAcAAAAAAgbwKbpPlnljoe-3aayvgGb7rGoKcxJKWAlQfWPDZZA7ecbxJg12kdE3Y4MNTd_kfaM7a_jRMh-dh5rBXxxRxc1RTWi4dUM9adX-M-eEE1G5iw 

May 29th 2026

 

 
 
 

 The Economist Today
 


 Our best journalism, handpicked each day
 


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTF9AAcAAAAAAgbwKbpQwaBTjlBtSb5AI8oxwkV-QhwLQc5fnw2I6wH26uVJkFYMZMO6TueWZzasHsEbDpk5ENpPNMb2R6dtazuinm1FnlKXc2DN7EBOGxCM0A 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTF9AAcAAAAAAgbwKbpReTlDD-bER9jC6H8BAlw88ZuT9rQgLBpfxDhWbBOb5za3U39rAxFyuPkYFyBqv7QThoNU7RNJYsAsRbvrpL_DiaIp8GrW8miMAisHuA 



 
 

Lane Greene

Senior digital editor



 From history to fiction, science to finance, our journalists are always scouring the shelves for new good books. This week we 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTF9AAcAAAAAAgbwKbpS-Zn8e4YHC4w8sIrIG9gCqTaDlp4ZvXaly_lTozAoHRqKHNHjSVQj41FIYe2oMsKlTwoHQboPhLTatP8_NcT4dIbZ6I3pG04z 
round up some of our favourites  
 from the first half of 2026 to share with you.


 And after eight years in his job, our defence editor is moving on to a new posting. He leaves with a sweeping essay on the 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTF9AAcAAAAAAgbwKbpTaD1Z7OO2CzTvL8w3m3aw0hDcNs0Gw4KuIiI8b4V2ODuf6muuw-1dGZMpjFC3wudVYjSavGQlYFpgV3At2-U6okyGupbV14N_ 
changing nature of war  
 that he has seen in
